title: WallProtDB, a database resource for plant cell wall proteomics.
author: San Clemente H Jamet E
content:
S-EPMC4302427 PMC4302427 WallProtDB, a database resource for plant cell wall proteomics.

Background

During the last fifteen years, cell wall proteomics has become a major research field with the publication of more than 50 articles describing plant cell wall proteomes. The WallProtDB
